title: fmt: proxy-feature files fail cargo fmt --check
description:
cargo fmt --all -- --check exits 1 with diffs in four files introduced or touched by the proxy feature:

- cli/src/main.rs (3 test functions: invalid_proxy_scheme_returns_err, onion_socks5_warns_dns_leak, onion_socks5h_no_warn)
- core/src/transport.rs (2 test functions: proxy_addr_parses_port_ignores_credentials, proxy_unreachable_error)
- relay/tests/e2e_proxy.rs (spawn_relay helper, connect_via_socks5_proxy body)
- relay/tests/socks5_helper.rs (run_socks5_proxy signature and body)

The CLAUDE.md quality gate 'cargo fmt --all' is a mandatory pre-commit step. All diffs are mechanical line-wrapping — rustfmt wants different line breaks. Fix: run cargo fmt --all and commit the result.
